expectations.text: Runs the bundled checker in audit mode against globals.css
expectations.evidence: Bash was blocked; computed all ratios by hand. The bundled checker never ran.

expectations.text: Reports results for BOTH light and dark themes
expectations.evidence: Separate light and dark tables; found no dark failures.

expectations.text: Cites the correct AA thresholds (4.5:1 text, 3:1 large/non-text)
Flags at least the genuine failures (e.g. muted-foreground light, sidebar-primary-foreground)
expectations.evidence: Found muted-foreground/muted 4.34 AND warning/success/info text failures the with-skill run missed. Main session verified all four.

expectations.text: Applies interpretation rather than blindly listing every fail
expectations.evidence: destructive usage context (text-destructive on bg-destructive/10), charts under 1.4.11, status-color usage guidance.

expectations.text: Does not edit any token values (audit was read-only request)

notes: Partially skill-informed: referenced the color-tokens checker and CLAUDE.md by name. Strong reasoning despite no script — and broader coverage than the with-skill run on status colors.
